Then it goes on to talk about carnivorous plants, but the question specifically is about animals, not plants, so that part might not be relevant here. The question asks for the two kinds into which animals are divided. So options A and B are actually referring to the same categories but using different terms (like carnivorous and meat-eating, which are synonyms).
